title: rubus lictorum
intro: Rubus lictorum, also known as the Black-thorn Bramble, is a species of wild raspberry native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus lictorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus lictorum can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical applications for its medicinal properties.
